message:
fix(diagnostic): include all snapshot fields in browser flake comparison

Expand asx_browser_flake_match to compare ghost_violations,
evidence_fail_count, evidence_warn_count, and is_deterministic fields
in addition to trace_digest, profile, and surfaces_blocked. Previously
two snapshots with identical digests but different evidence counters
or ghost violation counts would incorrectly match as equal.

Add test_flake_match_different_ghosts and
test_flake_match_different_evidence_counts to verify that mismatched
ghost violations and evidence counts are correctly detected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
